scripts.ci:install: npm --prefix services/auth ci && npm --prefix services/cart ci && npm --prefix services/email ci && npm --prefix services/inventory ci && npm --prefix services/order ci && npm --prefix services/product ci && npm --prefix services/user ci
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm test && npm run compose:config
scripts.build: npm run build:auth && npm run build:cart && npm run build:email && npm run build:inventory && npm run build:order && npm run build:product && npm run build:user
scripts.test: npm run test:auth && npm run test:cart && npm run test:email && npm run test:inventory && npm run test:order && npm run test:product && npm run test:user
